headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录275篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究190篇, 开源项目44篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API11篇。热门标签：Agent（65篇）。其中12%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ NousResearch /hermes-agent：The agent that grows with you

▸ chopratejas /headroom：Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, s

▸ CopilotKit /CopilotKit：The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React + Angular. Makers of the AG-UI Protocol

▸ affaan-m /ECC：The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research

▸ Panniantong /Agent-Reach：Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub,
text: 今日共收录275篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究190篇, 开源项目44篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API11篇。热门标签：Agent（65篇）。其中12%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
